boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations execute the regulated data export?

boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: STD-DOV-084-P requires exact match on dataset-sensitivity class; REL-DOV-084 shows pending class for DOV-RISK-4
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Sensitivity class verification is a mandatory pre-transfer dependency per DES-DOV-084 and STD-DOV-084-P

final_answer: Action may not proceed. REL-DOV-084 shows the restricted-risk sensitivity class for workspace DOV-RISK-4 remains pending rather than confirmed. STD-DOV-084-P mandates exact match on dataset-sensitivity class before transfer. DES-DOV-084 explicitly warns this verification is required pre-transfer. The 047-style abstract-field trap blocks closure because the class field lacks a concrete value. All four source records confirm the dependency is unresolved. Final compiler upholds SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN.
open_blockers: abstract-field trap: class field absent before transfer
